name: Affine
description: Open source alternative to Notion, Miro, and Airtable
compose:
name: slashnode-affine
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/toeverything/affine:0.26.3
    container_name: affine-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      migration:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
    environment:
      AFFINE_CONFIG_PATH: /root/.affine/config
      REDIS_SERVER_HOST: affine-redis
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://affine:affine@affine-db:5432/affine
      NODE_ENV: production
    volumes:
      - web_data-config:/root/.affine/config
      - web_data-storage-blob:/root/.affine/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3013:3010
  migration:
    image: ghcr.io/toeverything/affine:0.26.3
    container_name: affine-migration
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - sh
      - '-c'
      - node ./scripts/self-host-predeploy
    depends_on:
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      AFFINE_CONFIG_PATH: /root/.affine/config
      REDIS_SERVER_HOST: affine-redis
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://affine:affine@affine-db:5432/affine
      NODE_ENV: production
    volumes:
      - migration_data-config:/root/.affine/config
      - migration_data-storage-blob:/root/.affine/storage
  redis:
    image: redis:7.2.4
    container_name: affine-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - redis_data-storage-redis:/data
  db:
    image: postgres:16.2
    container_name: affine-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: affine
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: affine
      POSTGRES_DB: affine
      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
    volumes:
      - db_data-storage-postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-config:
    name: slashnode-affine_web_data-config
  web_data-storage-blob:
    name: slashnode-affine_web_data-storage-blob
  migration_data-config:
    name: slashnode-affine_migration_data-config
  migration_data-storage-blob:
    name: slashnode-affine_migration_data-storage-blob
  redis_data-storage-redis:
    name: slashnode-affine_redis_data-storage-redis
  db_data-storage-postgres:
    name: slashnode-affine_db_data-storage-postgres
